architecture.note: Dedicated per-workload timeout is the correct resilience pattern; mirrors chatBridgeStartupTimeoutMs precedent.

security.note: Env knob passes through parsePositiveIntEnv (rejects zero/negative/non-int). No secrets, no injection, no new auth path.

notes: 1 awareness note: adapter generous-budget test is a weak guard alone but paired with the load-bearing config.test.ts that pins 30000.
